---
# title: "CeHDI Country Profile"
params:
  country_name: "Default Country"
  upr_all: NULL
  rec_plot: NULL
  mmr_map_plot: NULL
output: 
  pdf_document:
    includes:
      in_header: preamble.tex

# header-includes:
#   - \usepackage{xcolor}
#   - \definecolor{bgcolor}{HTML}{1c164d}
#   - \definecolor{fgcolor}{HTML}{FFFFFF}
#   - \pagecolor{bgcolor}
#   - \color{fgcolor}
#   # -- Added for Logo and Custom Header --
#   - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
#   - \usepackage{graphicx}
#   - \graphicspath{ {./} }
#   - \pagestyle{fancy}
#   - \fancyhf{} # Clear all header and footer fields
#   - \fancyhead[L]{\includegraphics[height=1.5cm]{logo}} # Left header with logo
#   - \fancyfoot[R]{\thepage} # Optional: page number in the center footer
#   - \setlength{\headheight}{1.8cm} # Adjust headheight to prevent overlap (logo height + some buffer)
#   # -- End of Logo additions --
# documentclass: article
date: "2025-09-30"
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# This chunk loads the necessary packages for the report
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
pacman::p_load(
  ggplot2, 
  ggtext, 
  patchwork
)
```

# `r params$country_name`  

This plot shows all health-related recommendations received by the selected state across all UPR cycles.
```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5, out.width="50%"}
print(params$upr_all+theme(axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black")))

```

```{r, fig.width=4, fig.height=3, out.width="50%"}
print(
  params$rec_plot+
    labs(y="Recommendations (N)")+
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%1.0f", n_tot), y = n_tot, vjust = -0.2), size = 5, fontface = "bold", color = "white") +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "white"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "white"),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "white"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      # legend.position = c(0.01, 0.99),
      # legend.justification = c("left", "top"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12,colour = "white"),
      # plot.background = element_blank(),
      plot.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = NA),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "white"),
      # panel.border = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_line(color = "white"),
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      legend.background = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(), 
      strip.text = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_blank()
    )
)
```

```{r, fig.width=6, out.width="50%"}
print(
  params$mmr_map_plot
)
```
